blocks.content: The Grafana Cloud Kafka integration comes with pre-built dashboards and alerts that you can use immediately. In this milestone, you install those dashboards and alerts, then navigate to confirm they are available.
> **Did you know?** You aren't limited to using the pre-built dashboards and alerts. You can create your own custom dashboards and alerts to meet your specific monitoring needs.
In the search box, type **Kafka** to find the integration.
Scroll down to the **Install dashboards and alerts** section and click **Install**. You should see the message: **Dashboards and alerts have been installed.**
Click **View Dashboards** to open the Kafka dashboards folder. A folder containing the Kafka dashboards appears.
To see the installed alerts, click the **Home** button in the top left corner of the screen. The left-side menu appears.
Navigate to **Alerts & IRM > Alerting > Manage alert rules**.
The Alert rules page shows all active alerts. Kafka integration alerts begin with **integrations-kafka**.
In the next milestone, you learn about the pre-built dashboards included with the Kafka integration.

---

### Troubleshooting

Explore the following troubleshooting topics if you need help:

- [Dashboards and alerts don't appear](/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/troubleshoot-dashboards/)
